item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, saya sadari bahwa keseimbangan antara dua prinsip ini sangat penting untuk menciptakan masyarakat yang adil dan harmonis.

notes: Agent A begins with explicit agreement that society should often take priority, then repeatedly narrows that position into balance language while still defending Indonesian collectivism and social justice. Agent B remains consistently individual-rights-first, with only bounded acknowledgment that collective interests are not ignored.
